headline: Nike CEO outlines transformation strategy after operational reset in fiscal 2026 (NYSE:NKE)
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) said it made significant progress strengthening its business during fiscal 2026, with President and Chief Executive Officer Elliott Hill outlining a broad operational transformation aimed at improving long-term growth and profitability. In a letter to shareholders, Hill said the company spent the year reshaping its organisation, investing in its brands and rebuilding key capabilities to position Nike for future success.
